experience.title: Consultant Executive Chef
experience.description: From Executive Chef to Restaurant Consultant | Helping Restaurants Elevate Standards, Operations & Profitability With a career as an Executive Chef leading some of London’s most prestigious restaurants, I bring firsthand expertise in high-level kitchen operations, menu development, and team leadership. Now, as a restaurant consultant, I help restaurant owners and operators achieve excellence in both the kitchen and front of house—improving efficiency, profitability, and overall guest experience. How I Help Restaurants Succeed: ✅ Kitchen & Back-of-House Optimization – Streamlining workflows, reducing waste, and maximizing efficiency ✅ Menu Engineering & Profit Maximization – Designing menus that balance creativity, cost control, and customer appeal ✅ Staff Training & Leadership Development – Building high-performance teams with strong kitchen culture and leadership ✅ Operational Excellence & Cost Control – Identifying opportunities to boost profitability without sacrificing quality ✅ Concept Development & New Openings – Assisting with launch strategies, branding, and kitchen setup for success I understand the challenges of running a high-caliber restaurant because I’ve lived them. My mission is to help restaurants refine their operations, elevate their culinary standards, and achieve sustainable growth. 📩 Let’s connect and discuss how I can help take your restaurant to the next level.
